content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_INSTALLER]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_INSTALLER]
( 
	[InstallerID] [nvarchar](50)  NOT NULL,
	[EmployeeID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[Name] [nvarchar](75)  NULL,
	[ContactName] [nvarchar](75)  NULL,
	[W9ExpDate] [datetime]  NULL,
	[WorkCompExpDate] [datetime]  NULL,
	[City] [nvarchar](35)  NULL,
	[State] [nvarchar](2)  NULL,
	[Zip] [nvarchar](7)  NULL,
	[Installer] [bit]  NULL,
	[Measurer] [bit]  NULL,
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,	
	[LP_InstallerID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_EmployeeID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](10)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [DATETIME]  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
